SLT: Brand bridge — Super Long Taper (2.5mm+). Minimizes skin resistance. Equivalent to: Kwadron Sublime / Extreme LT, Bishop Nano-Taper, Peak XL-Taper.
TX: Brand bridge — Textured surface. Micro-grooved to hold ~20% more pigment. Equivalent to: Kwadron Textured, Cheyenne Safety TX.
Open Liner: Parallel Needle Geometry. Not squeezed at the tip for bold, hollow lines. Brand Equivalent: Cheyenne OL Series (or use any pro Round Shader).
#10: Brand bridge — 0.30mm diameter (bugpin). Smooth gradients. Equivalent to: Kwadron Blue Box / Sublime, Bishop #10.
Hanging: The length of needle protruding from the tip. 1.5mm is standard for lining; 2.0mm+ is preferred for 'floating' the needle in shading.
